author: slowomir33-arch
name: LOGOS-44 Z=0 Coherence Field Decoder (Quantum Edition)
blurb: Iterative-routing micro-LLM: 44 passes through a single toroidal bottleneck with CDMA field decoder. ~300k trainable params, 1.2 MB artifact. Quantum seed from IBM ibm_fez (48 qubit collapse). Byte+archetype tokenizer (512 vocab). Coherence gate mixes field signal with residual.
note: val_bpb pending — requires FineWeb validation evaluation on 8xH100. This is an experimental architecture submission.
